title: Vault
description: Represents a 1Password vault that contains items. Vaults are used to organize and control access to secrets.

id.description: The unique identifier for the vault.

description.description: A description of the vault's purpose.

attributeVersion.description: The version of the vault attributes.

contentVersion.description: The version of the vault contents.

items.description: The number of items in the vault.

createdAt.description: The date and time the vault was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the vault was last updated.
